ops.title: PLF-05: productize the plugin scope-guard fleet-wide
ops.description: Scope churn confirmed live on yBook-Pro (7 project-scope records pinned to captain-hook cwd; 2 were project-ONLY/dark until a one-time heal 2026-07-22). The only mitigation (launchd scope-guard) exists solely on yasyf-home and its source is not in ~/Code. Steps: retrieve the scope-guard source from yasyf-home; land it in a fleet repo (cc-skills tools/ beside plugin-cache-prune.py); install launchd agents on BOTH machines; also install the plugin-cache-prune launchd agent on yasyf-home while there.

ops.text: scope-guard source retrieved from yasyf-home and committed to a fleet repo
launchd agent running on both machines (launchctl list shows it)
a deliberately project-scoped steal of a user-scope plugin is healed automatically within one guard interval
plugin-cache-prune launchd agent also installed on yasyf-home
